url.title: URL
url.description: The URL of the page to extract from

selectors.title: CSS Selectors
selectors.description: Array of CSS selectors to extract. Leave empty to auto-segment the page into meaningful sections.

save_preview.title: Save Preview Link
save_preview.description: Generate preview links on SnipCSS.com to view extracted snippets (free)

maxSegments.title: Max Segments
maxSegments.description: Maximum number of page segments to extract when auto-segmenting (only applies when selectors array is empty)

skip_original_screenshots.title: Skip Original Screenshots
skip_original_screenshots.description: Skip capturing desktop/mobile/iPad screenshots of original elements.
